zh.High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾希 萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Leigh of Walton於1444年出生在英國素瑞沃爾頓--坦斯時，他的父親Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding29歲，母親Joan Holcroft23歲。他於1471年與Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1495年11月25日在英國素瑞享年51歲。

zh-hans.High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾希 萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Leigh of Walton于1444年出生在英国素瑞沃爾頓--坦斯时，他的父亲Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding29岁，母亲Joan Holcroft23岁。他于1471年与Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1495年11月25日在英国素瑞享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Leigh of Walton was born in 1444, in Walton-on-thames, Surrey, England, his father, Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding, was 29 and his mother, Joan Holcroft, was 23. He married Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton in 1471, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 25 November 1495, in Surrey, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Leigh of Walton est né en 1444, à Walton-on-thames, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Holcroft, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton en 1471, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1495, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

Er hat 1471 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 25. November 1495 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Surrey, England.

Lui sposato Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton nel 1471, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 25 novembre 1495, nel Surrey, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Leigh of Waltonが1444年にイギリススリーワルトン-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父Thomas Leigh of Margaret Rodingは29歳，母Joan Holcroftは23歳であった。1471年にイギリスイギリススリーでMargaret Bold Leigh of Waltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1495年11月25日にイギリススリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Leigh of Walton(이)가 1444년 영국 수리 월토--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Holcroft(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1495년 11월 25일 영국 수리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton em 1471, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Leigh of Walton родился в 1444 г. в местности валтон-он-тамесь, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Leigh of Margaret Roding было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Holcroft, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton в 1471 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 25 ноября 1495 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
